description_long: This object represents a young child with stylized proportions, featuring a large head and slender limbs. The child has long hair styled into two thick pigtails, each adorned with small spherical accessories. The clothing appears to be a dress or tunic with short sleeves and a flared skirt, and the arms and legs are thin and elongated. The face is partially visible, showing a rounded cheek and a large eye, with a generally cartoon-like appearance. The overall form is simplified, with exaggerated features and minimal surface detail. The asset is constructed with smooth, low-polygon geometry and lacks fine texturing.
description: A stylized child with long pigtails, wearing a short-sleeved dress or tunic and featuring cartoon-like proportions and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the two thick pigtails, hair accessories, and the crown of the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated limbs, the profile of the head, and the flared skirt of the dress.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the back of the head, the pigtails, and the back of the dress.
description_view_3: Angled view from behind, showing the pigtails, the side of the head, and the flowing lines of the dress.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve dress or tunic with a flared skirt
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair styled in thick pigtails with spherical accessories
